title: AutoTOS domain analysis artifact
description: One analysis file per registrable domain (eTLD+1). Written by the generator, read by the extension. Stored at /v1/analysis/{domain}.json on the CDN.

schemaVersion.description: Contract version. Clients ignore files with a schemaVersion they do not understand.

domain.description: The registrable domain (eTLD+1) this analysis is keyed on, e.g. 'github.com'.

status.description: 'analyzed' = full result present. 'pending' = requested, not yet generated. 'unavailable' = TOS could not be found/fetched.

aliasOf.description: If present, this domain shares terms with the named canonical domain; clients may treat this file as a redirect. Optional — the client also resolves aliases locally.

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when this analysis was produced.

sources.description: The TOS / privacy-policy URLs that were fetched and analyzed.

contentHash.description: Hash of the analyzed source text. Used to detect when the live TOS has changed since analysis (staleness) and to skip re-analysis when unchanged.

score.description: Overall fairness score. 10 = user-friendly, 5 = neutral, 0 = hostile. Computed deterministically from findings; not produced by the LLM.

findings.description: The clauses detected in the terms.

title.description: Human-readable clause title (denormalized from the taxonomy for offline rendering).

evidence.description: The verbatim span quoted from the source text that supports this finding. MUST appear literally in the fetched source (validated by the generator).
